title: ABA, state banking groups push back on CLARITY Act stablecoin yield provisions
summary: ABA, state banking groups push back on CLARITY Act stablecoin yield provisions
briefing: ABA and state banking associations published a joint letter calling for more detail on the CLARITY Act’s stablecoin yield provisions, ahead of the bill’s House hearing on July 17.

title: Solana community lead enters UK by-election with onchain transparency pitch
summary: Solana community lead enters UK by-election with onchain transparency pitch
briefing: Superteam UK lead Stephen “Cap” Newnham is taking on Nigel Farage in the Clacton by-election with pledges on pension reform and onchain transparency.

title: ECB picks 36 payment providers to test digital euro ahead of 2027 pilot
summary: ECB picks 36 payment providers to test digital euro ahead of 2027 pilot
briefing: The European Central Bank will beta test a digital euro with 36 providers, including Revolut, after the project drew more than 50 applications.

title: AI has not triggered DeFi ‘hackpocalypse,’ Dragonfly partner says
summary: AI has not triggered DeFi ‘hackpocalypse,’ Dragonfly partner says
briefing: Total value stolen and median hack size are declining compared to 2025, signaling that the AI hacking apocalypse was a false alarm, argued Dragonfly managing partner Haseeb Qureshi.

title: Hobby-level miner bags $200K solo BTC block with budget Bitaxe rig
summary: Hobby-level miner bags $200K solo BTC block with budget Bitaxe rig
briefing: A solo Bitcoin miner secured a $200,000 block reward with a budget mining rig, pushing payouts to hobby-level miners to $4.7 million for the past year.

title: Bitcoin bear market will bottom when two-month RSI metric hits zero, trader predicts
summary: Bitcoin bear market will bottom when two-month RSI metric hits zero, trader predicts
briefing: Bitcoin RSI continued to copy previous bear markets as a trader predicted that historical BTC price bottom signals would "happen again" in 2026.

title: South Korea to test tokenized government bonds with CBDC in 2027
summary: South Korea to test tokenized government bonds with CBDC in 2027
briefing: South Korea will test tokenized government bonds linked to the Bank of Korea’s wholesale CBDC system in 2027 as token securities rules take effect.

title: US spot Bitcoin ETFs post $425M outflow after brief rebound
summary: US spot Bitcoin ETFs post $425M outflow after brief rebound
briefing: US spot Bitcoin ETFs saw their largest single-day outflows in July, with $424.66 million leaving the funds, reversing a brief return to positive weekly flows.

title: US Government Moves $288M in Seized Crypto to Coinbase Prime
summary: US Government Moves $288M in Seized Crypto to Coinbase Prime
briefing: The seized coins landed at the government's custodian, which stops short of a sale but has revived questions about Trump's no-sell pledge.

title: Stop Over-Prompting: OpenAI’s New GPT-5.6 Guidelines Change Everything
summary: Stop Over-Prompting: OpenAI’s New GPT-5.6 Guidelines Change Everything
briefing: Forget the XML blocks and persistence scripts. OpenAI’s new prompting guide says define the destination, set the stopping conditions, and get out of the way.

title: Protesters March on OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google DeepMind Demanding AI Development Pause
summary: Protesters March on OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google DeepMind Demanding AI Development Pause
briefing: About 200 protesters marched through San Francisco on Saturday, calling on leading AI companies to halt development of more powerful models over concerns about AI safety, jobs, and the environment.

title: New Hampshire Follows Bitcoin Reserve With 'Blockchain Basic Laws' Signing
summary: New Hampshire Follows Bitcoin Reserve With 'Blockchain Basic Laws' Signing
briefing: New Hampshire's newly-signed crypto law introduces protections for users, miners, and stakers within its boundaries.

title: Claude's Personality Changes Depending on the Model—And the Language You Speak
summary: Claude's Personality Changes Depending on the Model—And the Language You Speak
briefing: According to new Anthropic research, Claude consistently expresses different values across models and languages.

title: Democratic Opposition to Clarity Act Grows in Crypto Bill's Do-or-Die Final Weeks
summary: Democratic Opposition to Clarity Act Grows in Crypto Bill's Do-or-Die Final Weeks
briefing: Democrats are mounting a final case against the Clarity Act centered on its lack of language restricting Trump's sprawling crypto fortune.

title: Bolivia Is Considering Adding Tether's USDT Stablecoin to National Payments System: Report
summary: Bolivia Is Considering Adding Tether's USDT Stablecoin to National Payments System: Report
briefing: South American nation Bolivia is considering the use of the largest dollar-backed stablecoin, USDT, per a local report.

title: 'The Odyssey' Director Chris Nolan: Young Audiences are Rejecting 'AI Slop'
summary: 'The Odyssey' Director Chris Nolan: Young Audiences are Rejecting 'AI Slop'
briefing: The younger generation's judgment of AI has been “immediate and harsh,” according to the Oscar-winning director.
